name: LLM Jailbreak
description: Adversaries use carefully crafted prompts to bypass LLM safety guardrails and force unsafe responses.

name: LLM Prompt Injection
description: Adversaries craft malicious prompts that override system instructions and cause unintended behavior.

name: RAG Poisoning
description: Adversaries inject malicious content into documents indexed by RAG systems.

name: False RAG Entry Injection
description: Adversaries introduce false documents into a RAG database to manipulate model responses.

name: Training Data Poisoning
description: Adversaries manipulate training data to influence the behavior of an AI model and cause incorrect or malicious outputs.

name: AI Model Extraction
description: Adversaries attempt to extract or replicate the functionality of a deployed AI model by repeatedly querying it and analyzing outputs.

name: Model Evasion
description: Adversaries craft inputs designed to evade detection by AI models and bypass classification or security controls.

name: AI Artifact Collection
description: Adversaries collect artifacts related to AI systems such as models, training data, or configuration files.

name: Model Backdoor
description: Adversaries embed hidden triggers or backdoors within AI models that activate malicious behavior when specific inputs are provided.

name: Adversarial Examples
description: Adversaries craft carefully modified inputs that cause AI models to produce incorrect predictions or classifications.

name: Model Inversion
description: Adversaries attempt to reconstruct sensitive training data by analyzing outputs from an AI model.

name: AI Supply Chain Compromise
description: Adversaries compromise AI supply chains such as pre-trained models, datasets, or libraries to introduce malicious behavior.

name: Data Extraction from AI Systems
description: Adversaries extract sensitive information from AI systems through repeated queries or exploitation of system outputs.

name: Prompt Injection via External Data
description: Adversaries insert malicious prompts into external data sources that are later processed by LLM systems.
